overview: AidLink is a premium Smart Resource Allocation platform connecting NGOs, volunteers, and resources. Features a clean professional interface with an interactive map, New Volunteers showcase, full user profile management with dark/light mode, and a persistent AI chatbot — all wrapped in a cinematic glassmorphism design.
features: Interactive map with volunteer and request location markers (no API key required)
New Volunteers section showcasing 8 most recent volunteers with availability and task info
Full user profile page with editable settings (photo, name, contact, address, role, notifications)
Activity history, completed tasks, and saved requests tracking
Account security options and password management
App-wide dark/light mode toggle persisted across sessions
Persistent AI chatbot powered by Gemini (English only)
NGO and Volunteer dashboards with glassmorphism UI
Responsive, animated layouts with modern gradient design
